form.title: Add a movie
form.description: Curate your collection by adding new cinematic masterpieces.

titleIntro.heading: Find your favorite movie
titleIntro.description: Use the form to add your favorite movie, or search your collection below.

modalModify.title: Edit Movie Details
modalModify.description: Refine the cinematic presentation for your collection.

loginPage.title: Login
loginPage.descriptionRegister: Create your account to start saving movies.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.userAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgetPasswordPage.title: Reset password?
forgetPasswordPage.description: We will send you a link to your email so you can create a new password.

updatePasswordPage.title: New password
updatePasswordPage.description: Choose a secure password for your account.

homePage.title: Save Your Movies
homePage.description: The faintest ink is better than the best memory… but a web app is even better.

homeCards.title: How does it work?
homeCards.createAccountDescription: Sign up on the platform to get your own personal space where you can save and organize your movies.
homeCards.saveMoviesDescription: Easily add the title, year, streaming platform, poster link, and a short synopsis for each movie you want to register.
homeCards.AccesYourCollectionDescription: View and manage your movie list anytime, keeping an organized record of what you have watched or want to watch.

explicationProject.title: Hello, let me introduce myself!
explicationProject.description: This project is a software development practice project created for my personal portfolio. If you find it useful, feel free to use it. The stack includes Vue 3, using Pinia for state management, Vue Router, i18n for internationalization, Tailwind CSS for styling, and TypeScript. For the backend and user authentication, the project uses Supabase, while deployment and hosting are handled through Netlify.

removeMovieModal.title: Remove Movie?
removeMovieModal.descriptionPt1: Are you sure you want to remove
removeMovieModal.descriptionPt2: from your shelf? This action cannot be undone.

policyPage.textTerms: By creating an account, you agree to our
policyPage.title: Privacy Policy
policyPage.description: This is the privacy policy for the movie explorer app. It explains how we collect, use, and share your data when you use our app.

confirmEmailPage.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmailPage.description: We sent you a confirmation link to your email. Click the link to activate your account, then come back here and enter your movies.

infoPage.howToUseDescription: Just search for your favorite movie, then check that the data is correct, remember to edit all the content, until you put the poster of your preference
infoPage.HoToEdit: How do I edit a saved movie?
infoPage.HoToEditDescription: To edit a movie, first open the movie card. Then click the edit icon located next to the movie title. This will allow you to update the movie information.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.answer1: This platform helps you organize and keep track of the movies you’ve watched or want to watch. You can store details like the title, release year, streaming platform, poster, and a personal synopsis.
faqPage.question2: Can I edit or delete movies from my list?
faqPage.answer2: Yes. You can update or remove any movie you have saved, allowing you to keep your collection organized and up to date.
faqPage.question3: How are movie posters and details added?
faqPage.answer3: You can add movies manually or search for them using an integrated movie database API that provides posters and basic movie information.
faqPage.answer4: Yes. Your movie list is associated with your account and only you can view or manage your saved movies.

insightsPage.title: User Insights
insightsPage.description: A cinematic breakdown of your viewing habits. Your journey through the lens, curated and analyzed.

cardVideo.title: Detailed Summary of Your Movie
cardVideo.description: Get a clear overview of every movie you save. Quickly see the title, year, poster, and synopsis to remember what the movie is about and why you added it.
cardVideo.description2: Analyze your viewing habits. The app generates statistics from the movies you save to highlight your viewing preferences.

watchlist.title: Watch List
watchlist.description: Here you can see the movies you've marked as pending to watch.
watchlist.empty: You have no movies in your watch list. Save movies from recommendations.

statsFavs.title: Discover your favorite statistics
statsFavs.description: Analyze your viewing habits. The app generates statistics from the movies you save to highlight your viewing preferences.
statsFavs.noDecades: Not enough favorite movies with valid year.
statsFavs.noDirectors: No directors in your favorite movies.
statsFavs.noActors: No actors in your favorite movies.
statsFavs.noWriters: No writers in your favorite movies.

favorites.title: Favorite Movies
favorites.description: Here you only see the movies you marked with a heart in your collection.
favorites.empty: You don't have favorite movies yet. Mark movies with ♥ on the movies page.

recommendations.title: Recommended for You
recommendations.subtitle: Based on your saved movies and preferences, here are 12 movies you may like.
recommendations.emptyMinimum: Mark at least 3 movies as favorites (♥) in your collection so we can recommend titles based on your taste.
recommendations.noResults: We couldn't find recommendations right now. Try adding more movies.
